level_signals: 7+ years of experience in strategy and operations, consulting, and/or program management
Scope spans highly cross-functional strategic programs across Stripe
Expected to execute with minimal guidance in high-ambiguity contexts

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of experience in strategy and operations, consulting, and/or program management
Experience working in highly cross-functional settings, and in a role that spans strategy, analysis, and operations in a fast-paced environment
Strong program management skills with experience managing end-to-end execution of projects/programs that have transformed their company's operations and delivered quantifiable business impact
Robust critical thinking and analytical skills, with the ability to derive strategic insights from data

Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the the ability to articulate complex topics in an easy-to-consume way to leaders and peers across different teams, such as product, engineering, and sales
Ability to manage multiple stakeholders with varying priorities and drive creative solutions and commitment to a shared goal
Experience with tools for tracking and reporting progress such as dashboards, project trackers, or internal documentation platforms
An interest in digging into the details of products and processes to improve the experience of our users and internal teams alike
An ability to execute with minimal guidance, and in contexts with a high degree of ambiguity

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working in customer-facing roles (e.g. customer support, sales, partnerships, consulting, professional services, etc.)
Experience in fintech, financial services, payments, or regulated technology environments
Experience digging in to understand how new-to-you technical products work, and understanding customer and agent pain points
Familiarity with SQL and data analysis platforms such as Looker, Power BI, or Tableau

scope.surface: Support Programs team — strategic initiatives spanning Support, Product, and internal operations serving 1M+ cases/year
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational efficiency and effectiveness of support organization
Quantifiable business impact from strategic programs
core_responsibilities: Partner closely with Support leadership and cross-functional stakeholders to scope and execute large projects addressing highest priorities for the Support organization
Seamlessly transition from strategy to execution by defining objectives, facilitating decision making, translating into operational plans, and ensuring delivery against those plans
Facilitate alignment, resolve ambiguity, and unblock dependencies across internal teams and cross-functional stakeholders
Drive joint Support-Product strategy and operating model
Improve end-to-end experience of priority user groups (large platforms, AI start-ups, Enterprises)

green_flags: Clear description of example strategic programs (Support-Product strategy, priority user group experience, paid support)
Minimum requirements are clearly separated from preferred qualifications
Explicitly encourages applications from candidates who meet only minimum requirements
Role has significant strategic ownership and cross-functional influence at Stripe scale (1M+ support cases/year)
red_flags: Location, work authorization, and visa sponsorship are entirely absent from the JD — key logistics unknown
Role scope is broad and potentially diffuse across Support, Product, and internal operations — could indicate undefined ownership
